calendar.matters:
PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Mar-14-2023 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-12-2022 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-03-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Eli Coffino, via ZOOM, for Caroline Dixon, Petitioner.

Mr. Coffino advises that the court should have all that it requires to grant the petition. The court advises Mr. Coffino that the main question for him this morning was to confirm addresses for Messrs. Veit and Kroll. Mr. Coffino advises that he filed a second supplement to the petition addressing the preceding. The court reviews the second supplement, and the supplement is approved in open court. The court confirms that there are no appearances to object to this petition. The court states for the record that it intends to grant the petition, admitting the will dated Jun-01-1991, granting Ms. Dixon full authority with no bond required. The court intends to set a status on close of estate on Dec-12-2022 at 9:00 am in Department 204.

The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-20-2021 Continued To Nov-01-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
